executive_summary.narrative: CRITICAL: Critical duplicate intel rate detected. HIGH: Masked actor fingerprints detected in live feed, API api/latest.json critically stale (74.1h old).

recommendations.title: Validate + clean dedup state
recommendations.description: Run dedup_state.py validation against current manifest to purge stale fingerprints.
recommendations.rationale: [CRITICAL] Critical duplicate intel rate detected — dedup_skip_rate_approx=0.6439 (threshold: 0.4)
recommendations.rollback: data/processed_intel.json is backed up as .tmp before any write.

recommendations.title: Seed dedup state from manifest
recommendations.description: Bootstrap dedup state from all existing manifest items to prevent future duplicates.
recommendations.rationale: [CRITICAL] Critical duplicate intel rate detected — dedup_skip_rate_approx=0.6439 (threshold: 0.4)

recommendations.title: Rebuild feed manifest
recommendations.description: Re-run manifest builder to consolidate all intel sources into feed_manifest.json.
recommendations.rationale: [CRITICAL] Critical duplicate intel rate detected — dedup_skip_rate_approx=0.6439 (threshold: 0.4)
recommendations.rollback: Previous manifest backed up to data/.manifest_backups/ automatically.

recommendations.title: Tighten title similarity dedup threshold
recommendations.description: Lower Jaccard similarity threshold in enforce_feed_uniqueness() to catch more near-dupes.
recommendations.rationale: [CRITICAL] Critical duplicate intel rate detected — dedup_skip_rate_approx=0.6439 (threshold: 0.4)
recommendations.command: MANUAL: Edit scripts/dedup_state.py — adjust similarity_threshold parameter.
recommendations.rollback: git revert last commit to dedup_state.py
recommendations.approval_reason: Changing dedup sensitivity may over-filter legitimate intel variants.

recommendations.title: Force APEX AI rebuild on all items
recommendations.description: Run master_p0_fix.py to unconditionally rebuild apex_ai block on every intel item.
recommendations.rationale: [HIGH] Masked actor fingerprints detected in live feed — masked_actor_count=10 (threshold: 0)

recommendations.title: Refresh API feed files
recommendations.description: Regenerate api/feed.json and api/latest.json from current manifest.
recommendations.rationale: [HIGH] Masked actor fingerprints detected in live feed — masked_actor_count=10 (threshold: 0)
recommendations.rollback: Restore api/feed.json from git: git checkout HEAD -- api/feed.json

recommendations.title: Run full regression test suite
recommendations.description: Execute regression_tests.py to verify system integrity before/after changes.
recommendations.rationale: [HIGH] API api/latest.json critically stale (74.1h old) — api_latest_age_hours=74.12 (threshold: 6)
recommendations.estimated_impact: MEDIUM: Restores dashboard data freshness. Improves user experience.

recommendations.title: Recalibrate APEX AI risk scoring thresholds
recommendations.description: Adjust P1/P2/P3/P4 risk_score thresholds in build_apex_ai() to improve accuracy.
recommendations.rationale: [HIGH] Masked actor fingerprints detected in live feed — masked_actor_count=10 (threshold: 0)
recommendations.command: MANUAL: Edit scripts/master_p0_fix.py — modify risk threshold constants.
recommendations.rollback: git revert last commit to master_p0_fix.py
recommendations.approval_reason: Modifies core APEX AI scoring logic. Requires SOC validation before deployment.

recommendations.title: Configure external alerting for health anomalies
recommendations.description: Integrate Telegram/email alerts when system_health score drops below threshold.
recommendations.rationale: [HIGH] API api/latest.json critically stale (74.1h old) — api_latest_age_hours=74.12 (threshold: 6)
recommendations.command: MANUAL: Configure scripts/pipeline_alert.py with webhook endpoints.
recommendations.rollback: Disable alert config. No platform changes.
recommendations.approval_reason: Requires external service credentials and outbound network configuration.
recommendations.estimated_impact: MEDIUM: Restores dashboard data freshness. Improves user experience.

recommendations.title: Validate intel schema integrity
recommendations.description: Run validate_intel_schema.py to detect missing required fields and malformed items.
recommendations.rationale: [MEDIUM] Required field 'risk_score' missing in 53% of feed items — missing_risk_score_rate=0.5311 (threshold: 0.05)

recommendations.title: Clear data cache
recommendations.description: Remove stale cached data files to force fresh ingestion on next run.
recommendations.rationale: [MEDIUM] Required field 'risk_score' missing in 53% of feed items — missing_risk_score_rate=0.5311 (threshold: 0.05)
recommendations.rollback: Cache rebuilt automatically on next pipeline run. No data loss.

recommendations.title: Add new intel feed sources
recommendations.description: Integrate additional threat intel sources (OTX, CISA, MISP) to diversify coverage.
recommendations.rationale: [MEDIUM] Required field 'risk_score' missing in 53% of feed items — missing_risk_score_rate=0.5311 (threshold: 0.05)
recommendations.command: MANUAL: Edit scripts/run_pipeline.py — add new source URLs to FEED_SOURCES list.
recommendations.rollback: Remove added source URLs from FEED_SOURCES. Rerun pipeline.
recommendations.approval_reason: Adding new sources changes ingestion flow and may introduce unvalidated data.
